patterns.deps_struct: actionUpdateDeps R17 successor to var X=func
patterns.syscall_def: Defensible IFF (a)callee logs (b)best-effort doc (c)cleanup-defer w/primary (d)impossible-init. sg14a1 meets NONE
patterns.impl_defer_anti: defer fn(args) returning err discards. Fix: defer func(){_=fn()}()
patterns.tag_dup_anti: Pure-value decls duped across !js,!wasm should hoist untagged
patterns.panic_def: exemptions: sync.Once.Do funcLit, BUG: prefix, top-level init() no-receiver, doc 'panics on/if'. ENFORCED.
patterns.named_dur: Sleep in named time.Duration consts. APICallCooldown.
patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1040 POSITIVE selector LINTER_FLAGS="-X -test=false". R21: -errstringmatch -panicinlibrarycode -manualmutexunlock -osexitinlibrary -rawloginlib. Append flag for zero-violation analyzers. Refactor first for non-zero.
patterns.type_assert_safe: Safe single-value .(T): sync.Map/Pool cbs, post-literal-ctor, pass.ResultOf, type-switch. Else need ,ok.
patterns.manual_unlock_anti: Lock+manual Unlock leaks on panic. ENFORCED R21. Loop-body manual unlock would need //nolint.
patterns.zero_violation_enforce_R20_R21_R22: Registered analyzer with zero prod violations = free enforcement. R21 pattern proven: sg19a1 16-site refactor + sg20a1 zero-vio both ENFORCED via single PR. Next: sg21a2 fileclosenotdeferred (dismissed R22), sg22a1 regexpcompileinfunction+fprintlnsprintf combined.
patterns.cancel_defer_loop_anti: Sequential context.WithTimeout+manual cancel (not in loop) is clean refactor target. In-loop manual cancel is defensible to bound per-iter timeout, needs //nolint:contextcancelnotdeferred.
patterns.regexp_compile_anti_R22: regexp.MustCompile/Compile inside funcs with literal/const pattern = perf bug (re-allocs per call). Dynamic patterns (regexp.QuoteMeta(x), concat with var) are linter-exempt. Pkg-level var (...)  blocks are correct idiom in this repo.
patterns.strconv_parse_anti_R22: x, _ := strconv.Atoi/Parse* swallows error. Defensible IFF (a) upstream regex/semver guard validates numeric (b) explicit //nolint reason comment. Fix patterns: (1) //nolint per site, (2) extract mustAtoi helper with single //nolint, (3) refactor to handle err. Post-regex 'impossible' is the dominant pattern here.
patterns.fast_dismiss_R22: R21 issues #35389/#35390/#35391 closed not_planned within 2min of creation by maintainer batch action. Distinct from 7d auto-expire and from completed-when-fix-lands. Implies: re-filing same content unlikely to land. Probe with single combined zero-vio issue + low-effort enforcement framing rather than splitting into multiple separately-dismissable items.
